cost_estimate.notes: Teachable Builder $828/yr (paid). ElevenLabs $22/mo. AI build costs ~$300–500. Most cost already incurred. Revenue target: $249 early bird → $399 standard.
One-pager + Calendly already live ($0). Outreach is time only. Optional CRM tool $0–50/mo. Revenue target: $3,000–10,000 per engagement. Highest ROI of any phase.
Tier 1 no-code: $500–1,500. Tier 2 AI-assisted custom (recommended): $500–2,000 + 40–80 hrs. Tier 3 hired dev: $12,000–35,000.

cost_estimate.recommended_tier: Manual consulting first, then AI-assisted SaaS
cost_estimate.notes: Tier 1 manual (Notion+Airtable): $0–500, deliver as consulting first. Tier 2 AI-assisted SaaS (recommended): $3,000–8,000 + 120–200 hrs. Tier 3 hired agency: $75,000–200,000. Do NOT build until 3 consulting clients validate the framework. Revenue potential: $200–500/mo per institution × 20 institutions = $4,000–10,000/mo.

Writing: Pol time + Book Writing Agent (already running, $0 incremental). Dev editor: $2,000–5,000. Copy editor: $1,000–3,000. Cover design: $300–1,500. Formatting + ISBN: $200–500. Launch marketing: $500–2,000. Traditional publishing: free to query but 12–24 months longer — publisher covers editing/design. Self-publish total: $4,000–12,000.

agents.name: Content Scout
agents.purpose: Scans web/feeds for trending topics relevant to cardiac surgery PA niche; outputs content ideas to Discord
agents.notes: Now writes content/weekly-brief.md after each run (added Apr 1). Feeds LinkedIn + Instagram with unified weekly theme.

agents.name: LinkedIn Growth
agents.purpose: Drafts and queues LinkedIn posts targeting PA audience to build audience and drive course/consulting leads
agents.notes: Brief-aware: reads content/weekly-brief.md first (added Apr 1). Last run 1d ago (Apr 2 10 AM).

agents.name: Lead Magnet Builder
agents.purpose: Creates and distributes lead magnets (PDFs, templates) to grow email list and Teachable pipeline
agents.notes: Directly feeds MBA PA Academy enrollment funnel

agents.name: Course Architect
agents.purpose: Develops MBA PA Academy course content — scripts, lessons, curriculum refinements
agents.schedule_human: Every Monday 3:00 PM ET (weekly until May 12)
agents.notes: Changed to weekly Apr 1 for May 12 launch prep. Reverts to monthly May 13.

agents.name: Consulting Outreach (Midweek)
agents.purpose: Identifies and drafts outreach messages to potential consulting clients in cardiac surgery/PA space
agents.notes: Upgraded Haiku→GPT-5.4 on Apr 2 for warm lead judgment. Revenue-direct task justified premium model. Last run Apr 2 6 PM.

agents.name: Consulting Outreach (Weekend)
agents.purpose: Sunday batch run for consulting outreach pipeline
agents.notes: Fixed Apr 2. Model + delivery configured correctly. Timing conflict with Book Writing Session (both 7 PM Sun) but not blocking. Last run Apr 2 7 PM.

agents.name: Network Outreach
agents.purpose: Manages warm outreach to PA network contacts for consulting pipeline and course beta
agents.notes: GPT-5.4 appropriate — direct revenue impact. Last run Mar 28 4 PM.

agents.name: Book Writing Session
agents.purpose: Structured book writing sessions for PA leadership/career book project
agents.notes: Long-term asset; runs same time as Consulting Outreach Weekend — timing conflict. Last run Mar 30 7 PM.

agents.name: Instagram Content Agent
agents.purpose: Creates Instagram/Facebook content for MBA PA brand growth
agents.notes: Fixed Apr 1 — delivery via openclaw CLI. Manually triggered Apr 1, confirmed working. Brief-aware: reads content/weekly-brief.md. Last run Apr 2 2 AM (scheduled Tue 11 AM).

agents.name: Daily Cost Sentinel
agents.purpose: Analyzes daily spend, detects anomalies, updates ledger, delivers cost report to Discord
agents.notes: Fixed Apr 1 — timeout 300→600s, collector moved to 7:45 AM. Last run Apr 2 8 AM.

agents.name: Daily Cost Collector
agents.purpose: Collects daily transaction data from OpenAI/Anthropic APIs and writes CSV for sentinel
agents.notes: Runs 15 min before sentinel. Timing buffer fixed today. Last run Apr 2 7:45 AM.

agents.name: Cost Sentinel Renewal Check
agents.purpose: Checks for upcoming subscription renewals within 14 days and sends decision prompts
agents.notes: Runs 30 min after sentinel — good timing. Last run Apr 2 8:30 AM.

agents.name: Memory Governance Daily
agents.purpose: Validates memory files, processes promotion queue, enforces memory health rules
agents.notes: Fixed Apr 1 — delivery channel misconfigured, now uses openclaw CLI. Confirmed clean run. Last run Apr 2 9 AM.

agents.name: Backlog Intake Processor
agents.purpose: Processes new backlog entries, scores them, and updates backlog.md
agents.notes: Runs same time as Memory Governance — no conflict since different tasks. Last run Apr 2 9 AM.

agents.name: Weekly Metrics Digest
agents.purpose: Compiles weekly performance metrics across all agents and delivers summary to Discord
agents.notes: Runs same time as Backlog Review — potential conflict. Last run Mar 28 6 PM.

agents.name: Weekly Executive Summary
agents.purpose: High-level executive summary of the week: revenue progress, content output, system health
agents.notes: 30 min after Weekly Metrics — correct sequencing. Last run Mar 28 6:30 PM.

agents.name: System Health Sentinel
agents.purpose: Weekly system audit: checks cron health, file integrity, exec status
agents.notes: Local model appropriate for mechanical checks. Last run Mar 31 8 AM.

agents.name: Nightly Backup
agents.purpose: Full local backup + git-safe mirror push to GitHub
agents.notes: Fixed Apr 1 — exec unblocked, pre-commit secret leak check added, OpenAI key rotated. Last run Apr 2 2 AM.

agents.purpose: Daily Discord briefing: days to May 12 launch, modules done, today's priority action
outputs: Discord DM to Pol — daily launch countdown briefing
agents.notes: Fixed Apr 2 - delivery mode corrected from announce to none. Manual test run at 11:22 PM ET delivered cleanly to Discord.

model_optimization.action: KEEP — upstream pipeline brief, research+synthesis task. Haiku lacks judgment for multi-source topic scoring. Decision: 2026-04-02.
DONE — switched GPT-5.4 → Sonnet on 2026-04-02 (writing lane)
DONE — upgraded Haiku → GPT-5.4 on 2026-04-02 (revenue-direct, warm lead judgment)
DONE — assigned GPT-5.4 on 2026-04-02 (was unset/default, multi-step reasoning task)
model_optimization.reason: Memory health + ROI analysis + model routing decisions — requires judgment, not just execution

top_weaknesses: April 7 follow-ups with 23 leads are the #1 priority — momentum from the launch fades fast. No automated follow-up system exists yet.
Travel window Apr 11-26 has no LinkedIn posts queued beyond Apr 8 — content pipeline needs 4-6 posts drafted before departure.
Course recording hasn't started — May 12 launch is 40 days away and no video content exists yet. Module 1 script is done.
ManyChat trial ends April 12 — decision needed on whether Instagram engagement justifies $15/mo.
Linktree trial ends April 6 — $144/yr auto-charge. Confirm keep before departure.

top_improvements.item: Fix all isolated cron Discord delivery

✅ DONE — Individual/sole proprietor, Bank of America payout
🔴 PENDING — highest priority before departure Apr 11
🔴 PENDING — Module 1 script ready, launch May 12

bold_recommendation: You have 23 warm leads from the lead magnet launch (Apr 1), including healthcare executives, APP supervisors, and program directors. The highest-leverage move RIGHT NOW is converting these leads into consulting conversations before momentum fades. April 7 follow-ups are scheduled — make sure you personally reach out to the top 5: Heather James (Heart & Vascular APP Manager), Dawn Hughes (Healthcare CEO), Michael Sullivan (EVH Consulting LLC), Christian Trent (CT/Vascular Administrator), and Brian Fontenot (PharmD/MPAS/MBA). One call this week = $2,500. Five calls = $12,500. The Teachable course is on track for May 12 — Stripe is connected, course shell is built, 29 lessons live.
bold_recommendation_impact: 💰 Immediate actions: (1) Send 5 personal outreach DMs this week · (2) Prep Mitesh Patel briefing before Apr 9 call · (3) Script Modules 4-5 before Apr 11 travel · (4) Queue LinkedIn posts for Apr 11-26 window
